{{Quote|So this is Phorliss. Not exactly a likely place to find a top Imperial on the run.|[[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand">''[[Star Wars: Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand]]''</ref>}}
'''Phorliss''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Dolomar sector/Legends|Dolomar sector]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] that could support almost any kind of life.

==History==
During the [[Galactic War]], the [[Houk/Legends|Houk]] from [[Lijuter]] migrated to Phorliss.<ref name="Voyage">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Investigation|Voyage to Phorliss}}</ref>

After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] briefly used the aliases Karrinna Jansih<ref name="CSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> and Chiara Lorn<ref name="MJBTEH">[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 4|''Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand'' 4]]</ref> to work in a Phorliss [[Gorb Drig's cantina|cantina]] as a [[Waiter/Legends|serving girl]].<ref name="DFR">''[[Dark Force Rising]]''</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
